EB01-001.name: Kouzuki Oden
EB01-001.effect: All of your {Land of Wano} type Character cards without a Counter have a +1000 Counter, according to the rules.

EB01-002.name: Izo
EB01-002.effect: [On Play] Give up to 1 rested DON!! card to your Leader or 1 of your Characters.[On Your Opponent's Attack] [Once Per Turn] You may trash 1 card from your hand: If your Leader has the {Land of Wano} or {Whitebeard Pirates} type, give up to 1 of your opponent's Leader or Character cards −2000 power during this turn.

EB01-003.name: Kid & Killer
EB01-003.effect: [Rush] (This card can attack on the turn in which it is played.)[When Attacking] If your opponent has 2 or less Life cards, this Character gains +2000 power during this turn.

EB01-004.name: Koza
EB01-004.effect: [When Attacking] You may give your 1 active Leader −5000 power during this turn: Give up to 1 of your opponent's Characters −3000 power during this turn.

EB01-006.name: Tony Tony.Chopper
EB01-006.effect: [Blocker] (After your opponent declares an attack, you may rest this card to make it the new target of the attack.)[DON!! x2] [When Attacking] Give up to 1 of your opponent's Characters −3000 power during this turn.

EB01-007.name: Yamato
EB01-007.effect: [Activate: Main] [Once Per Turn] Give up to 1 rested DON!! card to your Leader or 1 of your Characters.

EB01-008.name: LittleOars Jr.
EB01-008.effect: [Once Per Turn] If this Character would be K.O.'d by an effect, you may trash 1 Event or Stage card from your hand instead.

EB01-009.name: Just Shut Up and Come with Us!!!!
EB01-009.effect: [Counter] Look at 5 cards from the top of your deck and play up to 1 {Animal} type Character card with a cost of 3 or less. Then, place the rest at the bottom of your deck in any order.

EB01-010.name: There's No Way You Could Defeat Me!!
EB01-010.effect: [Counter] K.O. up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with 6000 base power or less.

EB01-011.name: Mini-Merry
EB01-011.effect: [Activate: Main] You may rest this card and place 1 of your Characters with 1000 base power at the bottom of your deck: Draw 1 card.

EB01-012.name: Cavendish
EB01-012.effect: [On Play]/[When Attacking] If your Leader has the {Supernovas} type and you have no other [Cavendish] Characters, set up to 2 of your DON!! cards as active.

EB01-013.name: Kouzuki Hiyori
EB01-013.effect: [Activate: Main] You may trash this Character: Play up to 1 {Land of Wano} type Character card with a cost of 5 or less other than [Kouzuki Hiyori] from your hand. Then, draw 1 card.

EB01-014.name: Sanji
EB01-014.effect: [DON!! x1] [Your Turn] This Character gains +1000 power for every 3 of your rested DON!! cards.

EB01-015.name: Scratchmen Apoo
EB01-015.effect: [On Play] Rest up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with a cost of 2 or less.

EB01-016.name: Bingoh
EB01-016.effect: [Activate: Main] You may rest this Character: K.O. up to 1 of your opponent's rested Characters with a cost of 1 or less.

EB01-017.name: Blueno
EB01-017.effect: [Blocker] (After your opponent declares an attack, you may rest this card to make it the new target of the attack.)

EB01-019.name: Off-White
card_type: The Seven Warlords of the Sea
EB01-019.effect: [Counter] Up to 1 of your Leader or Character cards gains +4000 power during this battle. Then, look at 3 cards from the top of your deck; reveal up to 1 {Donquixote Pirates} type Character card and add it to your hand. Then, place the rest at the bottom of your deck in any order.

EB01-020.name: Chambres
EB01-020.effect: [Main] If your Leader has the {Supernovas} type, return 1 of your Characters to the owner's hand, and play up to 1 Character card with a cost of 2 or less from your hand that is a different color than the returned Character.

EB01-021.name: Hannyabal
EB01-021.effect: [End of Your Turn] You may return 1 of your {Impel Down} type Characters with a cost of 2 or more to the owner's hand: Add up to 1 DON!! card from your DON!! deck and set it as active.

EB01-022.name: Inazuma
EB01-022.effect: [End of Your Turn] If you have 2 or less cards in your hand, draw 2 cards.

EB01-023.name: Edward Weevil
card_type: The Seven Warlords of the Sea

EB01-024.name: Hamlet
EB01-024.effect: If you have 4 or less cards in your hand, all of your {SMILE} type Characters gain +1000 power.

EB01-026.name: Prince Bellett
EB01-026.effect: [DON!! x1] [When Attacking] If you have 1 or less cards in your hand, return up to 1 Character with a cost of 3 or less to the owner's hand.

EB01-027.name: Mr.1(Daz.Bonez)
EB01-027.effect: If your Leader's type includes "Baroque Works", this Character gains +1000 power for every 2 Events in your trash.

EB01-028.name: Gum-Gum Champion Rifle
EB01-028.effect: [Counter] If your Leader has the {Impel Down} type, up to 1 of your Leader or Character cards gains +2000 power during this battle. Then, your opponent returns 1 of their active Characters to the owner's hand.

EB01-029.name: Sorry. I'm a Goner.
EB01-029.effect: [Counter] Reveal 1 card from the top of your deck. If the revealed card has a cost of 4 or more, return up to 1 of your Characters to the owner's hand. Then, place the revealed card at the bottom of your deck.

EB01-030.name: Loguetown
EB01-030.effect: [Activate: Main] You may place this card and 1 card from your hand at the bottom of your deck in any order: Draw 2 cards.

EB01-031.name: Kalifa
EB01-031.effect: [On Play] DON!! −1 (You may return the specified number of DON!! cards from your field to your DON!! deck.): If your Leader has the {Water Seven} type, add up to 2 Character cards with a cost of 4 or less from your trash to your hand.

EB01-033.name: Blueno
EB01-033.effect: [On Play] DON!! −1 (You may return the specified number of DON!! cards from your field to your DON!! deck.): If your Leader has the {Water Seven} type, play up to 1 {Water Seven} type Character card with a cost of 5 other than [Blueno] from your hand or trash.

EB01-034.name: Ms. Wednesday
EB01-034.effect: [Blocker] (After your opponent declares an attack, you may rest this card to make it the new target of the attack.)

EB01-035.name: Ms. Monday
EB01-035.effect: [On Play] If your Leader's type includes "Baroque Works", up to 1 of your Leader or Character cards gains +1000 power during this turn.

EB01-036.name: Minochihuahua
EB01-036.effect: [Rush] (This card can attack on the turn in which it is played.)

EB01-037.name: Mr. 9
EB01-037.effect: [On Your Opponent's Attack] [Once Per Turn] DON!! −1 (You may return the specified number of DON!! cards from your field to your DON!! deck.): K.O. up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with a cost of 2 or less.

EB01-038.name: Oh Come My Way
EB01-038.effect: [Counter] DON!! −1 (You may return the specified number of DON!! cards from your field to your DON!! deck.): If your Leader's type includes "Baroque Works", select 1 of your Characters. Change the attack target to the selected Character.

EB01-039.name: Conquerer of Three Worlds Ragnaraku
EB01-039.effect: [Main] DON!! −1 (You may return the specified number of DON!! cards from your field to your DON!! deck.): K.O. up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with a cost of 8 or less.

EB01-040.name: Kyros
EB01-040.effect: [Activate: Main] [Once Per Turn] You may turn 1 card from the top of your Life cards face-up: K.O. up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with a cost of 0.

EB01-042.name: Scarlet
EB01-042.effect: [Activate: Main] You may trash this Character: Play up to 1 {Dressrosa} type Character card with a cost of 3 or less other than [Scarlet] from your hand rested. Then, give up to 1 of your opponent's Characters −2 cost during this turn.

EB01-043.name: Spandine
EB01-043.effect: [On Play] You may place 3 cards with a type including "CP" from your trash at the bottom of your deck in any order: Play up to 1 Character card with a type including "CP" and a cost of 4 or less other than [Spandine] from your trash rested.

EB01-044.name: Funkfreed
EB01-044.effect: [Activate: Main] You may rest this Character: Up to 1 of your [Spandam] Characters gains +3000 power during this turn.

EB01-045.name: Brook
EB01-045.effect: [On Play] If your opponent has a Character with a cost of 0, this Character gains [Rush] during this turn.

EB01-046.name: Brook
EB01-046.effect: [On Play]/[When Attacking] Give up to 1 of your opponent's Characters −1 cost during this turn. Then, K.O. up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with a cost of 0.

EB01-047.name: Laboon
EB01-047.effect: [Once Per Turn] When a Character is K.O.'d, draw 1 card and trash 1 card from your hand.

EB01-048.name: Laboon
EB01-048.effect: [Activate: Main] You may rest this Character: Give up to 1 of your opponent's Characters −4 cost during this turn.

EB01-049.name: T-Bone
EB01-049.effect: [On Play] K.O. up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with a cost of 2 or less.

EB01-050.name: ...I Want to Live!!
EB01-050.effect: [Counter] If you have 30 or more cards in your trash, add up to 1 card from the top of your deck to the top of your Life cards.

EB01-051.name: Finger Pistol
EB01-051.effect: [Main] You may trash 2 cards from the top of your deck: K.O. up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with a cost of 5 or less.

EB01-052.name: Viola
EB01-052.effect: [Blocker] (After your opponent declares an attack, you may rest this card to make it the new target of the attack.)

EB01-053.name: Gastino
EB01-053.effect: [On Play] Place up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with a cost of 3 or less at the top or bottom of your opponent's Life cards face-up.

EB01-054.name: Gan.Fall
EB01-054.effect: [Blocker] (After your opponent declares an attack, you may rest this card to make it the new target of the attack.)

EB01-056.name: Charlotte Flampe
EB01-056.effect: [On Play] You may add 1 card from the top or bottom of your Life cards to your hand: Draw 1 card.

EB01-057.name: Shirahoshi
EB01-057.effect: When this Character is K.O.'d by your opponent's effect, add up to 1 card from the top of your deck to the top of your Life cards.

EB01-058.name: Mont Blanc Cricket
EB01-058.effect: [DON!! x1] [Your Turn] If you have 2 or less Life cards, this Character gains +2000 power.

EB01-059.name: Kingdom Come
EB01-059.effect: [Main] K.O. up to 1 of your opponent's Characters. Then, trash cards from the top of your Life cards until you have 1 Life card.

EB01-060.name: Did Someone Say...Kami?
EB01-060.effect: [Main] Play up to 1 [Enel] with a cost of 7 or less from your hand or trash. Then, trash cards from the top of your Life cards until you have 1 Life card.

EB01-061.name: Mr.2.Bon.Kurei(Bentham)
EB01-061.effect: [On Play] Add up to 1 DON!! card from your DON!! deck and set it as active.
